candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; represents total revenue in most recent year and is the canonical revenue line.
Alternate revenue label used in other years; should be used as fallback when main 'Revenue' line is missing for a year.
Represents operating profit, not top-line revenue, so not appropriate for REVT.
Finance income, not operating revenue from customers.
Interest on cash/receivables, not sales revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, far from the concept of revenue.
Liability for deferred income, not the revenue flow itself.

variables.notes: Two revenue labels are used across years; both are included as a priority list so later processing can pick the first non-missing value per year.

candidates.why: Represents total operating expenses including overhead and possibly depreciation; too broad for direct cost of sales.
Overhead-type expenses, not direct cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold
candidates.why: Explicitly labeled direct cost of goods/services; best match for COGS.
Primarily labor overhead, broader than direct COGS and partially overlaps SG&A.
Another total operating expense aggregation; too broad for COGS.
Financing costs, not production costs.
Non-operating items, not cost of sales.
Financing-related, not direct production cost.
R&D expense, not general COGS.
Capitalized R&D adjustments, not COGS.
Specific rental expense disclosure, not comprehensive COGS.
Non-recurring items, not recurring COGS.
Balance sheet stock measure, not a period expense.

final_choice.row_label: Cost of Goods and Services Sold

variables.notes: Uses the explicit 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold' line as COGS and ignores broader operating expense totals.

candidates.why: Total operating expenses including COGS and D&A; too aggregated for SG&A components and includes non-SG&A items.
Represents non-production operating overhead, a core SG&A component.
Represents personnel-related operating overhead, another core SG&A component.
Income, not expense; should not be included in SG&A components.

variables.notes: Selects the two clear SG&A-type component lines and excludes the total operating expense bucket and income lines, per SG&A component rules.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Depreciation/amortization within R&D, not the gross R&D expense itself; less ideal than the direct R&D expense line.
Directly labeled R&D expense in the income statement; best match for XRD.
Represents the portion of R&D capitalized (often shown as a negative expense); a financing of R&D, not the period’s expense measure we want for XRD.
Balance sheet asset for capitalized development costs, not period expense.
Balance sheet gross R&D asset; not the income-statement expense flow.

variables.notes: Maps XRD to the explicit income-statement 'Research & Development Expense' line; capitalized components and related amortization are excluded.

candidates.why: Net of interest income and expense; used only as a fallback if detailed expense lines are unavailable.
Primary line for interest expense; best first-choice for XINT.
Interest component of lease liabilities; a component of total interest expense and a good fallback.
Other interest expense component; another good fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at fair value
candidates.why: Specific category of interest expense; included as an additional fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Generic interest expense label; include as lower-priority fallback in case it is used in some years.
Capitalized interest, not expensed; should not be used for XINT which targets P&L interest expense.
Minority interest in net income, unrelated to interest expense.
Minority interest in comprehensive income, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; can serve as another fallback if main lines are missing.
Interest-earning asset balance, not expense.
Interest-earning receivables balance, not expense.

candidates.row_label: Current Non Interest-bearing Receivables, Related Parties
candidates.why: Non-interest-bearing receivables; unrelated to interest expense.
Equity component for minorities, not interest expense.
Equity for minorities, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense on financial liabilities measured at fair value
Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross

variables.notes: Provides a prioritized list of explicit interest expense lines; net interest is included last as a fallback, while capitalized interest and equity-related items are excluded.

candidates.why: Income from equity-method investments, not an equity balance.
Income statement gain/loss, not total equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity holders of the parent company
candidates.why: Portion of net income/comprehensive income, not the equity stock on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Translation differences related to equity accounted investees
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity investments over OCI
candidates.why: OCI movement, not equity level.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value of equity investments
candidates.why: Change in value, not equity total.
Non-current asset representing investments, not shareholders’ equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent
candidates.why: Direct measure of equity attributable to owners of the parent; ideal for BE and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interests; used only if a parent-only line were missing, which is not the case here.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent

variables.notes: Uses the balance sheet line for equity attributable to the parent, which correctly excludes non-controlling interests in line with BE+MIB construction.

candidates.why: Income statement share of net income attributable to minorities, but not the equity stock; balance-sheet lines are preferred for MIB.
Income statement share of total comprehensive income; still not the equity stock; balance-sheet values preferred.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests in equity; ideal for MIB.
Alternative label for the same concept of minority equity; used as fallback if primary line is missing in some years.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not an equity stock; inappropriate for MIB.

variables.notes: Maps MIB to the balance sheet non-controlling interest lines, with both label variants provided as a priority list to cover all years.
